text.title: testing-pytest Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for testing-pytest as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Session-scoped DB fixture breaks under xdist
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Each worker gets its own session — database sequences can collide. Use separate DB per worker with worker_id fixture.

failure-mode.description: Patching at import location instead of usage location
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Python looks up names at call time in the namespace where they were imported, not the original module.
